Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="w-75 my-0 px-0 empty-section-placeholder-text text-center undefined">Ingen arrangement</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

MODERATE

<body>

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="header-title-empty-block"></h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="header-subtitle-empty-block"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Слой_1' appears 2 times

id="Слой_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'moviePrompterModal' appears 24 times

id="moviePrompterModal"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Memory

https://www.biff.no/f/memory/5807
Avvik: 28 | Bestått: 115
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="rounded" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1758819551194?optimizer=image&width=1200" width="100%"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<button class="btn flex-shrink-0 btn-primary" onclick="openPrivilegesModal();return;Modal.open('/add-or-edit-review/5807?reloadId=MovieReviews', { heigth: '500px', width: '45%', noPadding: true ,hideM

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Слой_1' appears 2 times

id="Слой_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'moviePrompterModal' appears 24 times

id="moviePrompterModal"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Filmarkiv

https://www.biff.no/archive/2015
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 427
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (165 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="feather feather-bookmark" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d=

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="header-title-empty-block"></h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="header-subtitle-empty-block"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Слой_1' appears 2 times

id="Слой_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'moviePrompterModal' appears 24 times

id="moviePrompterModal"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="rounded" src="https://mars-images.imgix.net/1694783556872?auto=compress&w=1200&fit=max" width="100%"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="bi bi-caret-right-fill" fill="white" height="1.2em" viewbox="0 0 16 16" width="1.2em" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M12.14 8.753l-5.482 4.796c-.646.566-1.658.106-1.658-.753V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class=""><style>a:hover { text-decoration: none; } /* .header_background { background-color: var(--color-primary); background-image: url(#E1251B); background-size: cover; border-bottom
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="w-75 my-0 px-0 empty-section-placeholder-text text-center undefined">Ingen visninger i salg for øyeblikket.</h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="header-title-empty-block"></h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="header-subtitle-empty-block"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Слой_1' appears 2 times

id="Слой_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'moviePrompterModal' appears 24 times

id="moviePrompterModal"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Eiketreet og dyrene som bor der

https://www.biff.no/f/eiketreet-og-dyrene-som-bor-der/5275
Avvik: 16 | Bestått: 110
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="bi bi-caret-right-fill" fill="white" height="1.2em" viewbox="0 0 16 16" width="1.2em" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M12.14 8.753l-5.482 4.796c-.646.566-1.658.106-1.658-.753V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class=""><style>a:hover { text-decoration: none; } /* .header_background { background-color: var(--color-primary); background-image: url(#E1251B); background-size: cover; border-bottom
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="w-75 my-0 px-0 empty-section-placeholder-text text-center undefined">Ingen visninger i salg for øyeblikket.</h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.7 Synlig fokus (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.7 (2.4.7 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Element has outline:none which may hide focus indicator

<button class="btn flex-shrink-0 btn-primary" onclick="openPrivilegesModal();return;Modal.open('/add-or-edit-review/5275?reloadId=MovieReviews', { heigth: '500px', width: '45%', noPadding: true ,hideM
Provide alternative focus styling if removing default outline
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Слой_1' appears 2 times

id="Слой_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'moviePrompterModal' appears 24 times

id="moviePrompterModal"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Filmarkiv

https://www.biff.no/archive/2018
Avvik: 182 | Bestått: 435
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (169 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="feather feather-bookmark" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d=
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="header-title-empty-block"></h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="header-subtitle-empty-block"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Слой_1' appears 2 times

id="Слой_1"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'moviePrompterModal' appears 24 times

id="moviePrompterModal"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Arrangement

https://www.biff.no/events
Avvik: 302 | Bestått: 462
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (218 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="feather feather-bookmark" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d=
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a data-target-partial="" onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Bottom Logo" class="footer__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1692864283796?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-8px"/> </a
Add href attribute or use a button element

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Wilding

https://www.biff.no/f/wilding/5592
Avvik: 17 | Bestått: 110
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=605302631376534&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="rounded" src="https://mars-images.imgix.net/1725871166862?auto=compress&w=1200&fit=max" width="100%"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="bi bi-caret-right-fill" fill="white" height="1.2em" viewbox="0 0 16 16" width="1.2em" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M12.14 8.753l-5.482 4.796c-.646.566-1.658.106-1.658-.753V
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class=""><style>a:hover { text-decoration: none; } /* .header_background { background-color: var(--color-primary); background-image: url(#E1251B); background-size: cover; border-bottom
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="w-75 my-0 px-0 empty-section-placeholder-text text-center undefined">Ingen visninger i salg for øyeblikket.</h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="header-subtitle-empty-block"></h3>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a class="poster-card__content" data-target-partial="" href="/f/borealis-listening-club-the-moon-is-down-the-status-quo-is-my-enemy/5349"> <div class="poster-card__main-container"> <div class="poster-
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a onclick="goHome()"> <img alt="Top Logo" class="header__logo" src="https://images.filmgrail.com/1763633665506?optimizer=image&width=1200" style="margin-left:-6px"/> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('EN')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">En</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="text-dark" onclick="setLocale('NO')"> <p class="py-2 px-3 m-0 block-primary">No</p> </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-white" href="https://www.filmgrail.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Filmgrail! </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a @click="clearQuery(false)" class="input-group-text search-panel-icons" href="javascript:;"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="search-panel-clear-icon"></span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

CRITICAL

<input :aria-label="placeholder" :placeholder="placeholder" @input="onQueryChange(); onQueryTyping();" class="form-control pl-0 m-2 ml-1 border-0 search-panel-input" ref="queryInput" type="text" v-mod
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
